_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELFs to the verifying keys they must be deployed with. Two ELFs from one `cargo prove build`: elf/cxfer-guest (the settle guest → program_vkey, immutable PROGRAM_VKEY) and elf/reflection-prover (the Bitcoin-state relay prover → bitcoin_relay_vkey, immutable BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY). verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts both sha256s on every PR. A rebuild that changes either ELF MUST regenerate its vkey + update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new immutable vkey — otherwise every settle (resp. every attestBitcoinStateProven) reverts. Each vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THAT ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol, test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol). The two share cxfer-core, so a cxfer-core change rebuilds BOTH — committing the ELFs is what keeps the prover box running the pinned bytes rather than a drifting rebuild.
guest_state: Settle guest (cxfer-guest, 0x00bb82ef): gen-1 op set + OP_SWAP + OP_LP_ADD/REMOVE + OP_OTC (2-party direct swap) + OP_BID (buyer-offline partial-fill bid) + the metadata-CID AssetMeta field (attest_meta now binds an IPFS contractURI cid). Swap/LP/OTC/BID amounts bound by opening sigmas (the settle prover never learns r). Reflection prover (reflection-prover, 0x0099e1c7): FULL SCAN — walks every tx of every block (tx-set merkle-complete) and every vin against the handed live UTXO set, commits bitcoinPrevHash+bitcoinTipHash for the contract relay anchor. Reflection F1-F4 (header anchor / self-declared difficulty / confirmation depth / spent-set completeness) are CLOSED and PROVEN on-chain (full-scan genesis 0xec719b81 three-way pinned). Both rebuilt from the current source and GPU-re-proven on the box; all 7 real-proof fixtures (confidential/swap/lp/otc/bid/crosslane settle + reflection) re-proven against these ELFs in one cycle. Lineage: settle 0x00d0fb85->0x00bb82ef, reflection 0x0050d656->0x0099e1c7.
